name: cc-imessage-remote-control
description: Text yourself a Claude Code session. iMessage 'Claude eBay' to your phone — your Mac spins up the session in that project with Remote Control on, ready to drive from your iOS Claude app.

plugins.name: cc-imessage-remote-control
plugins.description: Spin up Claude Code Remote Control sessions on your Mac via iMessage. The plugin ships the router scripts plus an interactive setup wizard.
